name: The City of Agartha & The Black Trial // A disgusting land of soot and sinners
description:
The stage is the underground city of Agartha.

In this country, civilization is rapidly blossoming thanks to the steam engine.

But so does the desire for money, fame, appetite and sexual desire.

Filthy sinners with many desires are secretly swirling around.

--Sinners should not live.

“Red Riding Hood, give them the judgement of death! And you shall get an opportunity for rehabilitation.''

For atonement, Red Hood continues to execute criminals.

Will the end be a comedy or a tragedy?

Only the starry eyes know that.

____________________________________________________________________________

Characters Mentioned: Little Red Riding Hood, Poro, Lindamea, Peitello, Garum, Charlotte, Baphomet (Vaguely), that blonde Alice looking maid (Who I've named Lucy), Captain Cook, Jifa al Bolmaki, Sister Emerald AS WELL AS that priest who I've named Jorgjy (Based off 'The Bishop' by Anton Chekhov slightly). King Izu is also written in.

There are some characters not mentioned here, but these are the various unimportant targets, such as the R... Dogs, Poisonous Snow Princess, Gidon, Fox Fool Follower, Oga, etc... Also not Great Actress Wen's D, she doesn't seem important in concept
creator: Tamesie
